nasb.text: Then Israel said, “Why did you treat me so badly by telling the man whether you still had another brother?”

esv.text: Israel said, “Why did you treat me so badly as to tell the man that you had another brother?”

cnv.text: 以色列說：“你們為甚麼這樣害我，告訴那人你們還有個弟弟呢？”

ccb.text: 以色列说：“你们为什么告诉他你们还有一个弟弟，给我惹麻烦呢？”

csbs.text: 以色列说：“你们为什么这样害我，要告诉那人你们还有一个弟弟呢？”
